title: Housekeeping Operations Home
body: Grand Sierra Hotel housekeeping department documentation. Supervisor reference hub for floors 12-18.

title: Housekeeping Floor Procedures 12-18
body: Standard operating procedures for daily room turnover on floors 12 through 18.

title: Linen and Supply Request Process
body: How to submit linen shortage and supply requests through the facilities portal.

title: Incident Reporting — Housekeeping
body: Steps for reporting guest room damage, staff injuries, or safety hazards on the housekeeping floors.

title: Staff Technology Resources
body: Reference page for PMS tablet login, badge access, and scheduling app troubleshooting.

title: IT Home — Grand Sierra Hotel
body: IT documentation hub for Grand Sierra Hotel staff. Submit tickets via the service portal.

title: Opera PMS Staff Guide
body: How to use Opera Property Management System for room status updates, including tablet enrollment steps.

title: Staff Badge — Request and Replacement
body: How to request a new staff access badge or report a demagnetized card.
